title: zaleya sennii
intro: Zaleya sennii, also known as the Senna shrub, is a small, spiny plant that belongs to the Caesalpiniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative effects due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Zaleya sennii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Zaleya sennii can be prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a powder for oral consumption, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
